prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程、电子信息等工科专业持续高热推荐，与该校招生 专业结构匹配；甘肃省2025年物理类考生约121443人，2026年总考生约218700人，按近年物理类占比约67.5%估算，2026年物理类考生约147500人，较2025年增加约21.5%，考生规 模大幅增长将加剧竞争。；新疆大学位于新疆乌鲁木齐，距甘肃较远，本地考生存在一定地域偏好阻力；该校在甘肃招生占比约2% –3%，属中等偏低水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的走势、2026年计划小幅缩招（缓解竞争）、以及甘肃省物理类考生大幅增加约21.5%（加剧竞争）三方面因素 ，考生规模增长对位次的上推作用大于缩招的下拉作用，预计2026年最低位次在2025年基准基础上继续后移但幅度收窄；预测最低位次约30629名，区间30129–31129名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 16739 → 18429 → 27202 → 20950 → 31574, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, especially in 2025, which shifted back by about 10624 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of about 31574; the university's enrollment plan in Gansu for Physics Category was 130 in 2021, 128 in 2022, 121 in 2023, 123 in 2024, and 137 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 128, a reduction of 9 students (about -6.6%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xinjiang University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 131st, with recent rankings fluctuating between 127–136, placing it in the mid-to-lower tier of 211 universities; no significant public opinion events related to Xinjiang University were found in the 2026 reputation data; Douyin popularity ranking is 72nd, with a rating of 'average'; no record of enrollment gaps was found in the abnormal filing documents, indicating overall stable application psychology; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Xinjiang University had no A- or above disciplines, with overall discipline strength at the mid-level of 211 universities, limiting its appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Electronic Information continue to be highly recommended, matching the university's enrollment major structure; the number of Physics Category candidates in Gansu in 2025 was about 121,443, and the total number of candidates in 2026 is about 218,700. Based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 67.5%, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in 2026 is about 147,500, an increase of about 21.5% compared to 2025, which will significantly intensify competition; Xinjiang University is located in Urumqi, Xinjiang, far from Gansu, with local candidates having some geographical preference resistance; the university's enrollment proportion in Gansu is about 2%–3%, which is moderately low.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward trend in rankings in 2025, the slight reduction in enrollment plan in 2026 (easing competition), and the substantial increase of about 21.5% in Physics Category candidates in Gansu (intensifying competition), the upward effect of candidate growth on rankings is greater than the downward effect of enrollment reduction. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will continue to shift back from the 2025 baseline but with a narrower margin; the predicted minimum ranking is about 30629, with a range of 30129–31129.
